title: Week 5 Hands On Activity Automated Data Transformation INFS3822
body:
INFS3822 – AI for Business Analytics

Week 5 Hands-On Activity – Automated Data Transformation Pre-requisites Please complete all Week 5 Pre-Seminar Activities, available on Moodle, under Week 5 section. Please complete the following in-class activities: o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya o Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Automated Data Exploration

Step by step guide Open your project on SAS Viya Model Studio. Please refer to Week 5 Hands-On Activity - Create an ML project in SAS Viya to create a project). Once your project is open, click on the Pipelines tab. Then, add a Data Transformation node to the Data node.

CRICOS Provider Code 00098G

Select Best transformation for interval variables (continuous) and one-hot encoding for class input variables (categorical). Then, run the pipeline.

The “Best” transformation is automatically chosen

Open the Transformation results

In-Class Discussion about the results of the Transformation node.

Add an Imputation node to the Transformation node

Run the pipeline
